description: Can you add more tilt to our little mini mockup in the hero section? It starts out like slightly tilted, I think, to one direction. I just want to add even more tilt and it kind of straightens up when you hover over it. I just want the default state to have a little extra tilt. Thank you.
title: Increase hero mockup tilt on default state
